meta.query_interpretation: Interpreted as a comparison query, about Pembrolizumab vs Nivolumab, grouped by phase.
meta.notes: Per-item totals may overlap when a trial studies more than one of the compared drugs. Counts are exact per bucket (ClinicalTrials.gov countTotal); up to 5 sample studies are cited per data point.
